creator: m.viey@wanadoo.fr
text:
Hi,

I have an issue with python shell in all my virtualenv (created with pyenv). It seems it repeats input, here I give 12345 and it repeats 12345 twice:

$ rlwrap python
Python 3.10.7 (main, Oct 27 2022, 14:11:14) [Clang 14.0.5 (https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git llvmorg-14.0.5-0-gc12386 on freebsd14
Type "help", "copyright", "credits" or "license" for more information.
>>> 123412345
12345
>>> 


I don't know if the issue comes from rlwrap or a misconfiguration .
